description: The Facchineri are a historical 'ndrina based in Cittanova, Calabria, operating since the late 19th century. They engage in extortion, management of commercial activities, and drug trafficking, with branches in Puglia, Umbria, and Lazio. They were involved in heroin trafficking and kidnappings in the past. The group has been involved in multiple feuds, notably with the Raso-Albanese-Gullace clans, and has connections to the Banda della Magliana in Rome.
